entries.definition:
f–ḍ–ḥ to expose, to uncover, to subject to shame, to
scandalise, to give a bad name to, to defame. Of this root, تَفْضَحُون
tafḍaḥūn, occurs once in the Qur’an.

تَفْضَح tafḍaḥ [imperf. v., trans.] to put to shame, to disgrace
(15:68) قَالَ إِنَّ هَؤُلَاءِ ضَيْفِي فَلَا تَفْضَحُونِ he said, ‘These are my guests,
so do not disgrace me.’
